nasb.text: and the priest shall make atonement for him before the Lord, and he will be forgiven for any one of the things which he may have done to incur guilt.”

esv.text: And the priest shall make atonement for him before the Lord, and he shall be forgiven for any of the things that one may do and thereby become guilty.”

cnv.text: 祭司在耶和華面前，為他所行的任何一件過失贖罪，他就蒙赦免。”

ccb.text: 祭司要在耶和华面前为他赎罪，他就会得到赦免。”
